description_long: This is a military-style twin-engine airplane with a camouflage paint scheme featuring green, brown, tan, and black patches. The aircraft has a straight, mid-mounted wing configuration and a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The engines are mounted on the wings, each with a visible propeller, and the landing gear appears to be fixed with two main wheels and a nose wheel. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a clear canopy, suggesting a multi-seat arrangement. Distinctive orange triangular markings are present on the wings and tail, adding to its military appearance. The overall structure is robust, with a streamlined fuselage and rounded nose.
description: A twin-propeller, camouflage-painted military airplane with mid-mounted straight wings, a conventional tail, and an enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the camouflage pattern, straight mid-mounted wings, and orange triangular markings on the wings and tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin propeller engines, the main landing gear, and the rounded nose with the cockpit canopy visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view to view 0, showing the same camouflage pattern and wing configuration, with the tail and propellers visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and the back of the engines and wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin piston engines mounted on the wings, each with a visible propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a multi-seat canopy at the front of the fuselage.
